zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie de Brabant於1460年出生在比利時布拉班特 瓦隆奧迪尼尼-盧瓦-拉-福時，她的父親Jean de Valois58歲，母親Marguerite De Flandre25歲。她和Louis II de Bourbon至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1521年1月12日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brabant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Aristide, Marcel, Normand, Ovila, Yvan.
French, Walloon, Flemish, and German: habitational name from Brabant, a province in the Low Countries.

English: cognate of 1 above, from Old French Brabant, Middle English Braban, Brabayn, used to denote both the region and an inhabitant of it. See also the synonymous Brabazon . In medieval England, Brabans were typically linen weavers and cloth merchants. The final syllable of Braban, when weakly stressed, was often altered to -ben, -bin, or -bon, and also to -bam. The additional -t or -d in post-medieval Brabant, Braband , etc. is probably excrescent, rather than a relic of the Old French form.

variants.name: Brabender
meanings: German (mainly Westphalia): habitational name for someone from Brabant (see   Brabant  ), perhaps applied also as a nickname for a merchant of Brabantine cloth.

variants.name: Brabazon
meanings: English: from Old French Brabançon, Anglo-Norman French Brabanzon, Middle English Brab(a)son ‘Brabanter’. This was originally an ethnic name for a native of the duchy of Brabant (now in north Belgium). Medieval Brabant was widely known for two exports, its brutal mercenary soldiers and its linen cloth. In the 13th century parts of France were devastated by marauding gangs of armed Brabanters, and brabançon came to be used generically to denote a mercenary, hired assassin, or robber. These originated in Brabant and Flanders, but in the course of time accepted recruits from anywhere. The true source of the surname is the presence in many English (and Irish) towns of Brabant cloth merchants.

variants.name: Bremner
meanings: Scottish: habitational name for someone from Brabant in the Low Countries, from Older Scots Brebner, Brabanare ‘native or inhabitant of Brabant’ (see Brabant and compare with the synonymous Brabazon ). Weavers from Brabant settled early at Aberdeen and on the east coast of Scotland.
German: habitational name for someone from the city of Bremen. This surname is very rare in Germany.

variants.name: Brabham
meanings: English: variant of Brabant , altered by association with English habitational names ending in -ham.

variants.name: Braband
meanings: German and English: variant of   Brabant  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie de Brabant was born in 1460, in Ottignies-Louvain-La-Neuve, Walloon Brabant, Belgium, her father, Jean de Valois, was 58 and her mother, Marguerite De Flandre, was 25. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Louis II de Bourbon. She died on 12 January 1521, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie de Brabant est née en 1460, à Ottignies-Louvain-La-Neuve, Brabant wallon, Belgique, son père, Jean de Valois, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Marguerite De Flandre, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Louis II de Bourbon. Elle est décédée le 12 janvier 1521, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie de Brabant 1460 in Ottignies-Louvain-La-Neuve, Wallonisch Brabant, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean de Valois 58 und ihre Mutter Marguerite De Flandre 25. Sie hatte mit Louis II de Bourbon mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 12. Januar 1521 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Brabant è nata il nel 1460 nel Ottignies-Louvain-La-Neuve, Brabant wallon, Belgio, sua padre, Jean de Valois, aveva 58 anni e sua madre, Marguerite De Flandre, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Louis II de Bourbon. Morì il 12 gennaio 1521, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie de Brabantが1460年にベルギーブラバント ワロンオッティグニース-ロウベイン-ラ-ネウブで生まれた時，父Jean de Valoisは58歳，母Marguerite De Flandreは25歳であった。彼女はLouis II de Bourbonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1521年1月12日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie de Brabant(이)가 1460년 벨기에 브라반트 월런 오티그니스-루바인-라-니우브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean de Valois(은)는 58세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite De Flandre(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Louis II de Bourbon(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1521년 1월 12일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Brabant nasceu em 1460, em Ottignies-Louvain-La-Neuve, Brabant wallon, Bélgica, seu pai, Jean de Valois, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite De Flandre, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Louis II de Bourbon. Ela faleceu em 12 de janeiro de 1521, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie de Brabant родилась в 1460 г. в местности оттигниес-лоувеин-ла-неув, брабант валлон, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Jean de Valois было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite De Flandre, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Louis II de Bourbon. Она умерла 12 января 1521 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie de Brabant nació en 1460, en Ottignies-Louvain-La-Neuve, Brabant wallon, Bélgica, su papá, Jean de Valois, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Marguerite De Flandre, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Louis II de Bourbon. Murió el 12 de enero de 1521, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 61 años.
